title: Metamorphosis Meadow
short_description: Egg, caterpillar, chrysalis, butterfly — but all jumbled up! Tap the life-cycle stages back into the right order for frogs, plants, ladybugs and more.
description: The meadow's life cycles have been shuffled into a muddle. Your job is to put each one back in order — tap the stages one by one, from the very start to the fully grown adult, whether it's a butterfly's egg-caterpillar-chrysalis-butterfly, a frog's eggs-tadpole-frog, or a seed growing into a sunflower. It teaches how living things grow and change, the stages of familiar life cycles, and the big idea of metamorphosis. Grade bands ramp from short, familiar 3–4 stage cycles, to 4–5 stage plants and minibeasts, to longer and trickier cycles at the top. Getting the whole order right first try and building streaks earns bonus points. A free online life cycles and metamorphosis science game for kids in grades 1–5, feeding your score and GP on OnlyGrins.
controls: Mouse / tap the stage cards in order, from first to last.
